induced_prompt_raw:
Generate a sentence with exactly three nested, center-embedded relative clauses using the template: **[Noun 1] [Noun 2] [Noun 3] [Noun 4] [Verb A] [Verb B] [Verb C] [Verb D]**. 

Ensure every noun has a corresponding active verb (forming subject-verb pairs in reverse order: 4-A, 3-B, 2-C, 1-D) so that no noun is left without its predicate. Do not truncate the verb sequence.
